text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 
43 
MC_PLAN_STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Managed Care Plan Location — State (ANSI Code) 
DESCRIPTION: The state code of the managed care service location for each unique managed care service location ID 
(i.e., for each occurrence of the MC_PLAN_LCTN_ID). 
SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_STATE_CD 
LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_STATE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
APL Location 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan
